topic: 72-hour fasting timeline — what science says hour by hour
caption:
Ever wondered what *really* happens inside your body during a 72-hour fast? 🤔 It's not just about skipping meals; it's a profound cellular reset! From burning through sugar stores to initiating deep cellular repair and immune system regeneration, your body is a metabolic marvel. Science shows specific benefits kick in at precise times, like peak autophagy at hour 24 and a powerful stem cell boost after 48 hours. This isn't just about weight loss; it's about optimizing your health from the inside out. 🔥 Ready to unlock your body's innate healing power? Always consult a healthcare professional before embarking on extended fasts. 🩺

💾 Save this so you don't lose it. Share with someone who needs to understand the science behind fasting. Follow @healthrecode for daily science-backed health. Don't forget — your future body will thank you! ✨
